svg.title: Smart Shop Platform — high-level architecture
svg.desc: Full system architecture showing React UI, API Gateway, 9 Python microservices (FastAPI and Flask), Kafka event bus, 3 AI Lambda agents, 5 data stores, and AWS/Terraform/Jenkins infrastructure layers.

g.text: FastAPI · Nginx · JWT validation · ECS Fargate

svg.text: VPC · private subnets · ECS cluster · ECR · Cognito · Secrets Manager · WAF · ACM · Route53 · CloudWatch
Modules fetched from github.com/your-org/ssp-terraform-modules and specialised per service
GitHub webhook → pytest / lint → Trivy → ECR push → terraform plan/apply → ECS or Lambda deploy → smoke test
